zh.title: 女巫预言全集 - 北欧神话末日预言诗《沃尔乌斯帕》原文与解读 | Völuspá
zh.description: 北欧神话最重要的预言诗《女巫预言》（Völuspá）全文收录，约66节诗歌描述世界创生、黄金时代、诸神黄昏与世界重生。古诺尔斯语原文配白话翻译与历史考据。
zh.keywords: 女巫预言,沃尔乌斯帕,Völuspá,北欧神话,诸神黄昏,拉格纳洛克,埃达诗集,Poetic Edda,北欧预言,世界树
zh.ogTitle: 女巫预言全集 | Völuspá - 北欧预言诗
zh.ogDescription: 北欧神话最重要的预言诗《女巫预言》全文收录，描述从世界创生到诸神黄昏的完整预言。
zh.twitterDescription: 北欧神话预言诗《女巫预言》全文，涵盖世界创生、黄金时代、诸神黄昏与重生。古诺尔斯语原文配白话翻译。

en.title: Völuspá - The Prophecy of the Seeress | Complete Norse Prophecy Poem with Analysis
en.description: The complete Völuspá ('Prophecy of the Seeress'), the most important poem in the Poetic Edda. ~66 stanzas covering creation, the golden age, Ragnarök, and world renewal. Old Norse text with modern translation and analysis.
en.keywords: Völuspá,Voluspa,Norse mythology,Ragnarök,Poetic Edda,seeress prophecy,Norse prophecy,Yggdrasil,Norse cosmology,völva
en.ogTitle: Völuspá - The Prophecy of the Seeress | Complete Norse Poem
en.ogDescription: The complete Völuspá from the Poetic Edda — Norse mythology's greatest prophecy poem, from creation to Ragnarök and world renewal.
en.twitterDescription: Völuspá: the Norse seeress's prophecy from creation to Ragnarök. Complete poem with translation and analysis.
